titleStmt.title: SII 40.168: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 168. (A.R. No. B. 303 of 1931.) Gannavaram, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone lying in a stream near the Sōmēśvarasvāmin temple in the village.
This is dated Nandana, Jyēshṭha śu. 15.
Registers grant of a pasture land to Gaṇaparāju, son of Rāmarāju Śaṅkanaṅgāru by Veligōṭi Narasappa at Matkuballi, which was in his nāyaṅkara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbbulu Agunēṁṭi
naṁdana saṁ . jyēṣṭa śu 15 lu veligoṭi narasappaṁgāru
rāmarāju śaṁkkanaṁgāri gaṇaparājuku Iccina bhū
dāna dharma śāsanaṁ mā nāyaṁkarānki celle matkuballi
lōnu krottavūriki dakṣiṇānanu paśuvula biṭi
kilāmu Aṁddulō guḍḍāludē khalu mī
ku dhārādattaṁgā yiccinaṁdku haddula vi
varamu tūrppunaku vūrabōḍu purōhi
tulamānyamunnu . rāmarāju yallappagā
ri mānyamunnu dakṣaṇāniki kaṁbhaṁpāṭi na
rsarāju mānyamunnu . paḍamaḍiki ḍoṁkavā
gunnu vuttarāniki grāmanattaṁ . yī ha
ddulaku lōnaina lāmu polamu re
ṁḍḍu kucceḷla polamu śrīrāmārpa
ṇaṁgānu Istimiganka mīputra pautra
pāraṁparyamu Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyi
gā sukhāna Anubhaviṁstu rāvalenu
śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 40.168 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
